arts.ttl: Preview: Luton Town vs. Norwich City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Luton Town and Norwich City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Terri Westgate: Nunez is a game saver among memories of Norwich City past
arts.sum: The twists and turns of a Championship season are often difficult to predict, and Norwich City fan columnist Terri Westgate I did not expect that matches against Queens Park Rangers to have such a negative influence on the Canaries' campaign.

arts.ttl: Norwich City have clear stance about player – Several offers pegged back
arts.sum: Borja Sainz is having a impressive season for Norwich City and has been one of their standout players. The 23-year-old winger has already scored 15 times in the Championship and has also provided two assists. His performances have attracted interest from other clubs and there has been talk the Spaniard could look to move on. The post Norwich City have clear stance about player – Several offers pegged back appeared first on Sport Witness.
